title: Conduction /features overlay
description: Curated, authoritative commercial feature list for an app's docs /features page. Lives at <app>/openspec/features.overlay.json. See docusaurus-preset/FEATURE_PAGE_STANDARD.md.

intro.description: EN intro paragraph above the grid

slug.description: Stable id; defaults to a slugified title if omitted

title.description: EN title, sentence case, human capability name (never a raw slug)

summary.description: EN benefit line: one claim, result-first, under ~16 words

status.description: stable = shipped & reachable; beta = partial/provider-dependent; soon = honest roadmap

providedBy.description: Cross-app provenance (e.g. openregister) for a capability backed by another app; credited as 'Powered by …'
